stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to CAP 698 figure 3.1.
Given the following information, calculate the minimum TODA for a multi-engine piston aircraft take-off. Assume an unbalanced field with stopway and clearway.

Mass: 4700 lbs
Pressure Altitude: 6000 ft
Temperature: 30°C
Runway slope: 2.5% upslope
Runway condition: wet grass
Tailwind component: 2 kt
